body_preview:
Thank you for applying.

Thank you for submitting your application to Stripe. Each day we receive hundreds of applications and our teams are committed to reviewing all of them. Once reviewed, we’ll let you know if we’d like to speak with you, need more information, or if your application isn’t a fit for our needs at the time. In the meantime please feel free to check out more about life at Stripe through our jobs page or via our blog posts.
